creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #5)

> … must be an issue with my 'everyday' profile. …

tl;dr I worked around by using Configuration Mania <https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/configuration-mania-4420/> to perform some resets. 

----

Focusing primarily on the diff (above), I spent an hour or so trying to recreate the problem. Couldn't recreate it. 

----

Closing note: given the time frame, it's possible/likely that I wrecked something whilst clutching at straws to understand the staleness issues, which have bugged me for years, and which were reported by another user on 2018-02-11 at <https://redd.it/7wth86>. 

PEBKAM. Not a bug.
